# MVP: Pilot Space Core Features

This directory contains specifications for **MVP (P0 + P1)** features (6 user stories).

## Quick Reference

| Document | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| [spec.md](./spec.md) | MVP user stories, acceptance criteria, FRs |
| [plan.md](./plan.md) | MVP implementation breakdown |
| [data-model.md](./data-model.md) | Entity definitions and relationships |
| [ui-design-spec.md](./ui-design-spec.md) | Interface specifications |

## MVP User Stories

| Priority | Story | Description |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| P0 | US-01 | Note-First Collaborative Writing |
| P1 | US-02 | AI Issue Creation |
| P1 | US-03 | AI PR Review |
| P1 | US-04 | Sprint Planning |
| P1 | US-12 | AI Context |
| P1 | US-18 | GitHub Integration |

## Future Phases

Features beyond MVP scope are documented in separate directories:

- **Phase 2 (P2)**: [specs/002-pilot-space-phase2/](../002-pilot-space-phase2/) - 9 user stories (Modules, Docs, Templates, Knowledge Graph, etc.)
- **Phase 3 (P3)**: [specs/003-pilot-space-phase3/](../003-pilot-space-phase3/) - 3 user stories (Semantic Search, Settings, Sample Project)
